---
title: "Papers"
---

## Working papers

::: {.pub-entry}
**Optimal design of financial transmission rights**  
Erich Trieschman, Saurabh Amin.  
*Submitted to PowerUp 2026.*  
[[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/XXXX.XXXXX)] · 
[[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID)] · 
[[PDF](papers/ftr-design.pdf)]
:::

## Earlier work

*Coming soon.*
